---
name: Add Web Archive
about: Request support for a new web archive
title: 'Add Web Archive: [WEB ARCHIVE NAME HERE]'
labels: add web archive
assignees: ''
---

## Web Archive Details
- **Archive name:** [e.g. Internet Archive (Wayback Machine)]
- **Organisation:** [e.g. Internet Archive]
- **Country:** [e.g. United States of America]
- **Continent:** [e.g. North America]
- **Website:** [e.g. https://web.archive.org]

## Requester Details
- **Affiliation (optional):** [e.g., Web archiving institute / independent researcher / other]  
- **Interest / role (optional):** [Brief description of why you are requesting this archive]  

## Memento Protocol and CDX Server API Endpoints
- **CDX server API address (optional):** [e.g. `https://web.archive.org/cdx/search/cdx?url=${url}`]  
- **TimeMap address (optional):** [e.g. `https://web.archive.org/web/timemap/link/${url}`]  
- **TimeGate address:** [e.g. `https://web.archive.org/web/`]  

## Replay API Endpoints
- **Raw content (id_ endpoint):** [e.g. `https://web.archive.org/web/${datetime}id_/${url}`]  
- **Navigation suppressed (if_ endpoint):** [e.g. `https://web.archive.org/web/${datetime}if_/${url}`]  

## Additional Notes
[Any quirks and special behaviour that may affect resource retrieval or replay]
